spells.name: Guidance
spells.description: You touch a willing creature and grant a brief bonus to an ability check.

spells.name: Sacred Flame
spells.description: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature that fails a Dexterity save.

spells.name: Cure Wounds
spells.description: A creature you touch regains hit points.

spells.name: Hunter's Mark
spells.description: You mark a target and deal extra weapon damage to it.

spells.name: Detect Magic
spells.description: For the duration, you sense the presence of magic within 30 feet of you.

spells.name: Magic Missile
spells.description: You create darts of magical force that strike targets automatically.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.description: A bright streak erupts into an explosion of fire in a 20-foot radius.

spells.name: Acid Splash
spells.description: You hurl a bubble of acid.

spells.name: Blade Ward
spells.description: You ward yourself against weapon strikes.

spells.name: Dancing Lights
spells.description: Create up to four torch-sized lights.

spells.name: Light
spells.description: You touch an object that sheds bright light.

spells.name: Mage Hand
spells.description: A spectral hand appears at a point you choose.

spells.name: Mending
spells.description: This spell repairs a single break or tear.

spells.name: Message
spells.description: You whisper a message that only the target hears.

spells.name: Poison Spray
spells.description: You project a puff of poisonous gas.

spells.name: Prestidigitation
spells.description: You perform a minor magical trick.

spells.name: Produce Flame
spells.description: A flickering flame appears in your hand.

spells.name: Ray of Frost
spells.description: A frigid beam of blue-white light streaks toward a creature.

spells.name: Resistance
spells.description: A willing creature gains a brief bonus on a saving throw.

spells.name: Shillelagh
spells.description: Wooden club or staff becomes empowered with druidic magic.

spells.name: Shocking Grasp
spells.description: Lightning springs from your hand to deliver a shock.

spells.name: Spare the Dying
spells.description: A living creature with 0 hit points becomes stable.

spells.name: Thaumaturgy
spells.description: You manifest a minor wonder of divine power.

spells.name: Vicious Mockery
spells.description: You unleash a string of insults laced with subtle enchantment.

spells.name: Bane
spells.description: Up to three creatures subtract from attacks and saves.

spells.name: Bless
spells.description: Up to three creatures add to attacks and saves.

spells.name: Burning Hands
spells.description: A thin sheet of flames shoots from your fingertips.

spells.name: Charm Person
spells.description: You attempt to charm a humanoid you can see.

spells.name: Comprehend Languages
spells.description: You understand spoken and written language.

spells.name: Command
spells.description: You speak a one-word command that a creature obeys.

spells.name: Detect Evil and Good
spells.description: For the duration, you know if aberrations and other creatures are nearby.

spells.name: Detect Poison and Disease
spells.description: For the duration, you can sense poison and disease.

spells.name: Entangle
spells.description: Grasping weeds and vines sprout in a square area.

spells.name: Faerie Fire
spells.description: Each object in a cube is outlined in colored light.

spells.name: Goodberry
spells.description: Up to ten berries appear and each can restore a little vitality.

spells.name: Healing Word
spells.description: A creature regains hit points from your spoken word.

spells.name: Mage Armor
spells.description: Protective magical force surrounds a willing creature.

spells.name: Sanctuary
spells.description: You ward a creature against attacks.

spells.name: Shield
spells.description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears and protects you.

spells.name: Shield of Faith
spells.description: A shimmering field appears around a creature and boosts defense.

spells.name: Sleep
spells.description: This spell sends creatures into a magical slumber.

spells.name: Speak with Animals
spells.description: You gain the ability to understand and communicate with beasts.

spells.name: Thunderwave
spells.description: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out from you.

spells.name: Guiding Bolt
spells.description: A flash of light streaks toward a creature.

spells.name: Aid
spells.description: Your spell bolsters allies with toughness and resolve.

spells.name: Enhance Ability
spells.description: A creature gains magical enhancement to one ability.

spells.name: Hold Person
spells.description: Choose a humanoid that can be paralyzed on a failed save.

spells.name: Invisibility
spells.description: A creature you touch becomes invisible.

spells.name: Lesser Restoration
spells.description: You end one disease or one condition affecting a creature.

spells.name: Misty Step
spells.description: Briefly surrounded by mist, you teleport a short distance.

spells.name: Pass without Trace
spells.description: A veil of shadows and silence radiates from you and your companions.

spells.name: Prayer of Healing
spells.description: Up to five creatures of your choice regain hit points.

spells.name: Scorching Ray
spells.description: You create three rays of fire and hurl them at targets.

spells.name: Spike Growth
spells.description: The ground in an area twists and sprouts hard spikes.

spells.name: Web
spells.description: You conjure a mass of thick, sticky webbing.

spells.name: Counterspell
spells.description: You attempt to interrupt a creature casting a spell.

spells.name: Daylight
spells.description: A sphere of bright light spreads out from a point.

spells.name: Dispel Magic
spells.description: Choose one creature, object, or magical effect to end spells on it.

spells.name: Fear
spells.description: Each creature in a cone drops what it is holding and becomes frightened.

spells.name: Fly
spells.description: You touch a willing creature and grant it a flying speed.

spells.name: Haste
spells.description: Choose a willing creature and speed up its movement and actions.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt
spells.description: A stroke of lightning blasts out from you in a line.

spells.name: Revivify
spells.description: You touch a creature that has died recently and restore it to life.
